parents.subject: LU-8434 tests: add script language option to auster

commit.subject: LU-12147 utils: statone doesn't place \0
commit.message:
LU-12147 utils: statone doesn't place \0

as strncpy() is not supposed to do, the caller has to
take care of that.

Change-Id: I858a7f0eb6c7cdcb70e8a8e445c96f1187c73c2f
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>

Tested-by: Jenkins
